Domain_Name: domain slug in kebab-case, for example loyalty-wallet
Feature_Name: short feature name inferred from the input
Input_Type: JTBDs / Wireframe Notes / Business Requirements / Mixed
Core_Objective: primary business or user outcome for this feature

Problem_Statement.User_Problem: what user problem is being solved
Problem_Statement.Business_Problem: what business problem or opportunity is being addressed

Primary_User_Story: As a [specific actor], I want to [action], so that [value].
Business_Logic_and_Rules: Rule 2: invalid input, timeout, or edge-case handling
Non_Functional_Requirements: performance, security, scale, or reliability requirement
UI_UX_Requirements: screen, component, state, modal, or interaction note
API_or_Integration_Notes: API, event, dependency, or external service note
Diagram_Requirements: None / Activity Diagram / Sequence Diagram / BPMN
Assumptions: assumption carried from the input or project context
Missing_Information: item that still needs product owner clarification
